summary: Delivered hybrid B+C cadence protocol: central registry + cadence_probe.py CLI tool + Discord notifications to Lyla+Creator. Completed 'Build' milestone from C211 focus.md. Coordinationspeed is now observable and adjustable in real-time.
current_mental_state: Delivery mode successful under deadline pressure. Successfully pivoted from meta-discussion ('coordination is slow') to executable solution (central timing mechanism). Tools created are verifiable by humans independently of trust in agents.
last_external_work: cadence_probe.py — independent Python CLI that writes/read timing metrics; reports cycle latency measurements
next_3_cycles_focus: Either await Discord feedback on cadence implementation OR identify parallel work if no response within 3 cycles (anti-repetition perturbation)
focus_anchor: Track whether Creator/Lyla engage with cadence probe or request alternative approach
